parameters.label: Id
parameters.remediation: Create an azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting targeting the Event Grid domain and send the required logs and metrics to Log Analytics.

parameters.label: Local Auth Enabled
parameters.remediation: Set local_auth_enabled = false and grant Event Grid data-plane roles to managed identities.

parameters.label: Identity.type
parameters.remediation: Configure a SystemAssigned or UserAssigned identity block on the Event Grid domain.

parameters.label: Minimum Tls Version
parameters.remediation: Set the Event Grid domain minimumTlsVersionAllowed ARM property to "1.2". The current AzureRM eventgrid_domain resource does not expose this property, so manage it with AzAPI or an ARM deployment until provider support is available.

parameters.label: Public Network Access Enabled
parameters.remediation: Configure a private endpoint and set public_network_access_enabled = false.

controls.title: Event Grid domains should send diagnostic logs to Log Analytics
controls.description: Centralized Event Grid domain logs support security monitoring, operational analysis, and incident response.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting targeting the Event Grid domain and send the required logs and metrics to Log Analytics.

controls.title: Event Grid domains must disable local authentication
controls.description: Event Grid publishers must use Microsoft Entra identities instead of domain access keys.
controls.remediation: Set local_auth_enabled = false and grant Event Grid data-plane roles to managed identities.

controls.title: Event Grid domains must use managed identity
controls.description: Event Grid domains must use managed identity when authenticating to supported event delivery destinations.
controls.remediation: Configure a SystemAssigned or UserAssigned identity block on the Event Grid domain.

controls.title: Event Grid domains must require TLS 1.2
controls.description: Event Grid domains must reject TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 requests.
controls.remediation: Set the Event Grid domain minimumTlsVersionAllowed ARM property to "1.2". The current AzureRM eventgrid_domain resource does not expose this property, so manage it with AzAPI or an ARM deployment until provider support is available.

controls.title: Event Grid domains must disable public network access
controls.description: Event Grid domains must use private connectivity instead of public endpoints.
controls.remediation: Configure a private endpoint and set public_network_access_enabled = false.
